clusters.justification: These terms share core functional reliance on limbic and salience networks dedicated to processing emotional valence, autonomic responses, and physiological arousal.
These terms coalesce around striato-cortical reward circuits responsible for calculating subjective utility, reinforcement learning, and guiding motivated decision-making.
These terms co-activate within the default mode network, subserving high-level, internally-directed models of the self, others, and interpersonal dynamics.
